[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100100010 3
1 101111000 5
2 001001100 3
3 001011111 6
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 101110011 6
7 001001101 4
